title: Ubiquiti UACC-Rack-Rails-Slide - Sliding Rack Rails
description: Adjustable sliding rails for UniFi rack-mount gear, designed for smooth sliding and flexible fit in 4-post racks . The rails can be adjusted for racks with a depth of 600-1066mm . Made of high-quality SGCC steel with a load capacity of 45kg USW-Pro-XG-24 USW-Pro-XG-24-PoE USW-Pro-XG-48 USW-Pro-XG-48-PoE USW-Pro-HD-24 USW-Pro-XG-10-PoE USW-Pro-HD-24-PoE USW-Pro-XG-Aggregation
